channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Anthropic has officially filed to go public
item.description: After months of speculation about whether OpenAI or Anthropic would be first in their race to IPO, Anthropic on Monday reached a key milestone: filing to kick off the process with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The filing sets the stage for what's sure to be a massive IPO. As of its fundraise last […]

item.title: Anthropic files to go public
item.description: The company said Monday it has filed confidentially for an IPO.

item.title: Sony’s new fight stick and gaming monitor launch in August
item.description: Sony is sharing new details about some of its upcoming gaming-focused hardware, including pricing and August launch dates for its FlexStrike fight stick and its 27-inch monitor. The FlexStrike fight stick will be available starting August 6th - the same day as the new PlayStation-published fighting game Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls - and will cost […]...

item.title: Florida sues OpenAI and Sam Altman over alleged 'exploitation of users'
item.description: Florida's lawsuit against OpenAI comes after a mass shooter at FSU reportedly consulted ChatGPT to plan the attack.

item.title: Anthropic is set to go public after filing paperwork with the SEC
item.description: The company behind Claude says it confidentially submitted a draft version of its S-1 form.

item.title: Tesla FSD : des utilisateurs portent plainte pour publicité mensongère
item.description: Malgré les promesses de Tesla, 4 millions de véhicules équipés du Hardware 3 ne pourront pas bénéficier du Full Self-Driving (FSD) en raison de limitations techniques. Des actions collectives ont déjà été engagées en Australie et aux Pays-Bas. C’est désormais au tour d’utilisateurs chinois de passer à l’offensive en attaquant le constructeur en justice pour publicité mensongère et en réclamant 583 000 $ de dommages et intérêts....

item.title: FlexStrike, écran 27″ QHD, Pulse Elevate : voici ce que Sony PlayStation a annoncé
item.description: Sony a dévoilé prix et dates de sortie pour son premier fight stick officiel, son écran PS5 27 pouces et ses enceintes Pulse Elevate. Bonne nouvelle pour les fans de versus fighting : mauvaise pour qui espérait brancher l'écran PlayStation chez lui.

item.title: ‘Our ​message is simple: Build European, buy European, protect European’: European cloud providers join lawmakers and NGOs to end reliance on US hyperscalers
item.description: The European Commission is pushing for less reliance on US hyperscalers, and European cloud companies, NGOs, and lawmakers are backing the move.

item.title: JCB Toughphone E10 review: This rugged phone has the raw performance of an abandoned bulldozer, but the price tag of something much better
item.description: The JCB Toughphone E10 is a robust device with average battery life, but the price is high for an entry-level device.

item.title: PlayStation's wireless fight stick and new gaming monitor arrive in August
item.description: The new PlayStation monitor and fight stick arrive this summer, but you'll have to wait until later in the year to snag the Pulse Elevate wireless speakers.

item.title: MiniMax-M3 debuts, eclipsing GPT-5.5 and Gemini 3.1 Pro on key benchmark performance for just 5-10% of the cost
item.description: Big news in enterprise AI broke over the weekend as Chinese AI startup MiniMax released its highly anticipated M3 large language model on Sunday evening Eastern time, pairing frontier-tier coding and agentic performance with a 1-million-token context window and native multimodality for a fraction of the cost of leading proprietary models, with pricing starting at just $20 per month under its new subscription token plans. The company's leadership also announced plans to deliver the model under an open source license including "open weights," allowing for full enterprise downloading and customiz...

item.title: SpaceX says it may issue ‘significant’ equity in ‘future transactions’
item.description: The company added a warning to prospective investors that a major dilution could be in the cards after it goes public.

item.title: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies
item.description: Windborne Systems' newest weather forecasting model beats the best government predictions by days.

item.title: Sony says its new FlexStrike Wireless Fight Stick is designed for beginners and those who grew up with gamepads because 'they deserve a shot' — 'We think the market is actually pretty well served already for people who already know and love fight sticks'
item.description: Sony has said the FlexStrike Wireless Fight Stick is designed specifically for beginner players who lack fight stick experience.

item.title: How to watch Love Island UK 2026: Free Streams & TV Schedule
item.description: Maya Jama and Iain Stirling welcome a new crop of singles to get saucy in the sun. Here's how to watch Love Island UK 2026 for free from anywhere.

item.title: MobLand season 2 is already in trouble before Paramount+ even confirms its release date — here's what the Tom Hardy drama actually means for potential season 3 renewal
item.description: In the last few days, conflicting reports about Tom Hardy's involvement in MobLand season 2 have surfaced — here's what we know and if this will affect a season 3 renewal.

item.title: Save $40 on the stylish Apple AirPods Max 2 headphones
item.description: The Apple AirPods Max 2 are on sale for $509 at Amazon. That's $40 in savings and their best price on record.

item.title: Vision Air, lunettes connectées, marché de l’optique : pourquoi Apple prépare son coup le plus ambitieux depuis l’Apple Watch
item.description: Apple prépare ses lunettes connectées pour fin 2027 et un Vision Air pour 2028-2029. Mark Gurman de Bloomberg détaille une stratégie calquée sur l'Apple Watch, visant le marché mondial de l'optique.

item.title: J’ai essayé la ROG Xbox Ally X20 : les bonnes révisions aux bons endroits
item.description: Pour fêter les 20 ans de sa marque Republic of Gamers, Asus dévoile une édition spéciale de sa console ROG Xbox Ally X20.

item.title: Darty lance un service de calibrage professionnel pour les téléviseurs
item.description: Darty annonce le déploiement en France d'un service inédit de calibrage professionnel de téléviseur, jusqu'alors réservé aux studios de production et aux experts de l'image. Comptez 99 € pour tous et 69,99 € pour les abonnés à Darty Max.

item.title: Anthropic’s browser agent got hijacked 31.5% of the time before safeguards engaged
item.description: Across the frontier labs, the highest prompt injection figures published this spring are Anthropic’s. Point a red-teamer at its newest model in a browser, and the attacker hijacked it 31.5% of the time before safeguards engaged. OpenAI, Google, and Meta never gave security leaders a comparable number to set beside it. That figure looks like a liability. In this comparison, it is the opposite. It's the one solid piece of ground.Four frontier labs each shipped a prompt injection disclosure, and no two match. Anthropic put 244 pages and four agentic surfaces on the table on May 28. OpenAI reporte...

item.title: ROG Xbox Ally X20 : la console portable d’ASUS passe à l’OLED, et l’addition s’annonce salée
item.description: ASUS offre enfin un écran OLED à sa console portable Xbox. Une dalle magnifique, taillée pour les yeux. Le hic : elle arrive avec des lunettes dont le seul but est de vous faire regarder ailleurs.

item.title: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway makes bold housing market wager: Acquiring Taylor Morrison and becoming America’s 4th largest builder
item.description: On Sunday, Berkshire Hathaway—which already owns Clayton Properties, America’s 12th largest homebuilder—said it’s acquiring Taylor Morrison—America’s No. 6 largest homebuilder—for $8.5 billion. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Adieu la pâte thermique ? Noctua mise sur un pad nanotube venu des satellites
item.description: Noctua va distribuer un pad thermique signé Carbice, à base de nanotubes de carbone et déjà éprouvé sur des satellites. AMD glisse aussi le composant dans une édition spéciale de son Ryzen 7 5800X3D.

item.title: Ce qui change au 7 juillet 2026 pour les voitures neuves (et pourquoi vous allez être surveillé)
item.description: Attention, votre futur véhicule va vous surveiller de très près. À partir de juillet 2026, tous les modèles neufs devront être dotés d'équipements de sécurité obligatoires, comme un freinage d'urgence capable de détecter piétons et cyclistes et les alertes anti-distraction des conducteurs. Êtes-vous prêt à embarquer dans cette révolution technologique, et à changer votre façon de conduire ? ...

item.title: Pixel Watch 5 reportedly found in the ocean
item.description: A scuba diver near St. Martin surfaced with one of the more unusual gadget leaks in recent memory — the unreleased Pixel Watch 5.

item.title: Cet opérateur voit les choses en grand avec son forfait 5G sans engagement de 300 Go à seulement 12,99 €/mois
item.description: Auchan Telecom profite des beaux jours pour ressortir son forfait 5G 300 Go sans engagement à 12,99 euros/mois, sans frais cachés.

item.title: RTX Spark : Windows 11 serait-il le maillon faible du grand projet de Nvidia ? Pas si sûr
item.description: Nvidia l'a annoncé fièrement : toutes les applications Windows seront compatibles avec l'architecture ARM de RTX Spark. Oui, mais pour quelles performances ?

item.title: Everything Nvidia revealed at its Computex keynote
item.description: Nvidia unveiled the Vera Rubin AI platform, Vera CPU, new AI models, and a Microsoft partnership during its Computex keynote.

item.title: À cause de Netflix, Disney et Apple, la plateforme Spliiit écope d’une amende de 785 000 euros
item.description: Le tribunal judiciaire de Paris a jugé que Spliiit s’était rendu coupable d’actes de concurrence déloyale, de contrefaçon de marque et de complicité de violation des conditions générales d’utilisation. Spliiit est condamné à verser 785 000 euros aux entreprises concernées et à fournir des détails sur les abonnements partagés depuis 2019. Ce montant pourrait être revu à la hausse prochainement....

item.title: Summer Game Fest 2026: All the news from gaming’s busiest week
item.description: Get ready for some gaming news. It’s officially June, which means splashy new events from PlayStation, Xbox, and gaming hype man Geoff Keighley. But this season doesn’t just feature the big tentpole shows; there will be a bunch of smaller events, too, and they might feature some promising games as well. But this year’s events […]

item.title: The Oura Ring 4 is on sale at Amazon, but theres a catch
item.description: Shop the best Oura Ring deals at Amazon. You can currently save up to 31% on the Oura Ring 4 in select colors and sizes.

item.title: Les smartphones à 150 euros vont disparaître, le marché va plonger violemment en 2026
item.description: Trois cabinets d'analyse prédisent un effondrement historique des ventes de smartphones dès le second semestre. En cause : la crise structurelle de la mémoire vive et les tensions géopolitiques au Moyen-Orient.

item.title: Having trouble with Zoom calls while working from home? This VPN could improve your entire home office experience
item.description: ISP peering issues can range from annoying to truly obstructive, but this ExpressVPN deal offers an affordable fix

item.title: An affordable, long-lasting AirTag alternative is $15 right now
item.description: There are many solid Bluetooth trackers for iPhones that tap into Apple’s expansive Find My network. Some are thin, some are a bit chunkier. And, evidently, some look like tiny soccer balls. Ugreen’s FineTrack 2 glows in the dark, and it has a loud 110-decibel alarm when you need to find it. It’s just $14.99 […]

item.title: Atari is buying the maker of the Crossy Road games
item.description: Atari's buying the maker of the Crossy Road games.

item.title: Get ready for summer! Anker's heavy-duty power station just got a massive 50% price cut — making this off-grid powerhouse the perfect backup for campers and RVs
item.description: Anker Solix C2000 portable power station is half price and delivers 2,400W power, 4,000W peak output, and ultra-fast charging.

item.title: Malaysia's under-16 social media ban carries fines up to $2.5 million
item.description: Malaysia's under-16 social media ban has taken effect.

item.title: Robots : voici la preuve que la Chine vit déjà dans un autre monde
item.description: Le doute n'est plus permis : la Chine a fait des robots, notamment les humanoïdes intelligents, l'une de ses plus grandes priorités tech. Voici un certain aperçu de l'avenir.

item.title: The myth of the hero’s journey—and why it’s killing change in your organization
item.description: The universe cannot be overpowered, you need to attract its forces to you. There is a powerful narrative arc called the Hero’s Journey that is employed in stories like Star Wars. A hero, like Luke Skywalker, receives a call to adventure. He or she has doubts at first, but meets a mentor, crosses the first threshold, undergoes an ordeal and, once successful, receives a reward and returns home changed for the better....

item.title: Norton VPN expands global footprint with 25 new server locations and adds on-demand IP switching — here's everything you need to know
item.description: Norton VPN has quietly dropped a significant update, expanding its network to over 130 locations across 90 countries and introducing a clever manual IP rotation tool to help users seamlessly bypass streaming blocks.

item.title: The epic Lord of the Rings Minas Tirith Lego set now comes with two free gifts
item.description: Preorder the new The Lord of the Rings" Minas Tirith Lego set and get a free Lego Grond set and a free Lego Ninja Cole's Car.

item.title: Lenovo just dropped an amazing school and work laptop deal — the Ryzen 7 touchscreen IdeaPad is now under $550 at Best Buy (and it was $900 before)
item.description: With a Ryzen 7 chip and DDR5 RAM, all for under $550, the IdeaPad Slim 3 is an easy recommendation from me.

item.title: The next big career move for young Hollywood? Reading audio smut
item.description: Though Gen Z has developed a reputation for being so disinterested in sex that they don't even want to see it on TV, the popularity of series like Heated Rivalry and The Summer I Turned Pretty has made it very clear that more than a few young people do, in fact, like their entertainment a […]

item.title: Your guide to June’s biggest gaming events
item.description: It's early June, which means it's video game event season once again. Now that E3 has been gone for a few years, a bunch of showcases and presentations have started to fill the void, including big productions like Summer Game Fest Live and smaller affairs like Wholesome Games Direct. If you love following gaming news, […]

item.title: I played Saros with the new Pulse Elevate wireless speakers, and was wowed by their three-dimensional audio and noise-crushing mic — and I interviewed Sony about why it's releasing speakers in a world of gaming headsets
item.description: I went hands on with the Sony Pulse Elevate wireless speakers, and their planar magnetic drivers and noise-reducing mics could be a total gamechanger for PS5 players.

item.title: I tried Sony’s new FlexStrike Wireless Fight Stick and got my butt kicked on Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls — here’s everything you need to know about the upcoming PlayStation peripheral
item.description: Love fighting games but never used a fight stick? Sony’s new peripheral could be perfect for you.

item.title: I never knew pummeling Nazis on a handheld could be so much fun, but Indiana Jones and the Great Circle's Nintendo Switch 2 debut proves fortune, glory and punching fascists can be even more entertaining on the go
item.description: The legendary archaeologist's greatest gaming adventure sacrifices little in its leap to Nintendo's hybrid hardware.

item.title: Le Chat devient Vibe : Mistral mise tout sur les agents IA
item.description: Le félin tricolore a vécu. Mistral vient de débaptiser Le Chat, son assistant le plus connu, pour un nom qui sonne nettement plus Silicon Valley que Quartier latin. Derrière le changement d'étiquette se cache surtout un changement de métier.

item.title: « Des dizaines de milliards de robots d’ici 10 à 20 ans » : la prédiction folle de Nvidia
item.description: D'après un haut responsable de Nvidia, le nombre de robots sur la planète dépassera un jour celui des humains. Il prédit des dizaines de milliards d'appareils dans les prochaines années.

item.title: Moins chers mais plus fragiles : comment l’industrie a sacrifié la durée de vie de certains panneaux solaires
item.description: Les panneaux solaires ne cessent d’évoluer. Des technologies nouvelles, des performances toujours meilleures, mais l'industrie n'avance pas toujours dans la bonne direction. À force d'optimiser les coûts, les fabricants semblent avoir sacrifié la durabilité de leurs produits. La preuve, des panneaux qui se brisent seuls, de manière spontanée.

item.title: DuckDuckGo makes its ‘no-AI’ search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
item.description: Alternative search engine DuckDuckGo launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox users.

item.title: Revolut rolls out services to thousands of users in India ahead of broader launch
item.description: The British fintech has built a waitlist of about 450,000 users in India as it prepares for a broader launch.
